murdercraft.role.murderer.objective: Discreetly eliminate all innocents with your knife.
murdercraft.role.detective.objective: Identify the murderers and shoot them with your pistol. Beware of friendly fire!
murdercraft.role.innocent.objective: Survive! Find the hidden pistol to become a Detective, or help one identify the murderers.
murdercraft.role.murderer.description: You are a murderer. You don't know who the other murderer is. Stay discreet.
murdercraft.role.detective.description: You are the detective. You are alone. Your pistol doesn't forgive mistakes.
murdercraft.role.innocent.description: You are an innocent. Stay alert, warn the detective.
murdercraft.game.started: ✦ The game has begun! Good luck.
murdercraft.event.hidden_pistol_dropped: ⚠ A pistol has been hidden somewhere...
murdercraft.knife.not_murderer: Only Murderers can use the knife
murdercraft.pistol.not_detective: Only the Detective can use the pistol
murdercraft.pistol.friendly_fire: ⚠ You shot an innocent — you lose your weapon permanently
murdercraft.hidden_pistol.promoted: ★ You picked up the hidden pistol — you are now a Detective!
config.murdercraft.title: MurderCraft Configuration
config.murdercraft.minPlayers.tooltip: Players required to start a game (recommended: 5+)
config.murdercraft.detectiveLosesGun: Detective loses gun on friendly fire
murdercraft.debug.started: ⚠ [DEBUG] Game started in test mode (min players bypassed)
murdercraft.debug.start.fail: [DEBUG] Cannot start (is a game already in progress?)
murdercraft.debug.invalid_role: [DEBUG] Invalid role. Use: murderer, detective or innocent
murdercraft.debug.spawnpistol.success: [DEBUG] Hidden pistol spawned in front of you
config.murdercraft.debugAllowMobDamage.t: [DEBUG ONLY] The knife and pistol can deal lethal damage to mobs. Disable for real matches.
